news.title: Amsterdam verhoogt toeristenbelasting stapsgewijs naar 20 procent - hospitality-management.nl
news.summary:
# Summary

Amsterdam is gradually increasing its tourist tax to 20%, which will affect accommodation costs for visitors to the city. This news is relevant to travelers planning to visit Amsterdam, as it will incrementally raise the fees they pay when booking hotels and other lodging. The phased increase means visitors should expect higher nightly rates over time when staying in the Dutch capital.

Growing up as "hospitality kids," the brothers are now running their own venue in the city. Visitors to Amsterdam would care because Bar Staal represents a new addition to the local bar scene from entrepreneurs with deep roots in the Dutch hospitality tradition.

news.title: Groep van 33 personen daagt niet op bij restaurant De Bomma: "Menu stond klaar, maar ze stuurden hun kat" - GVA
news.summary:
# Summary

Instead of canceling or attending, the group apparently sent a cat to the restaurant as a prank or statement. Visitors to the city should be aware that De Bomma may have stricter cancellation policies or deposit requirements in response to this incident.
